summary: Tested FlipSlab Engine Module 3 (Market Data) and Module 4 (Flip Calculator) + eBay OAuth integration. All backend (7/7) and frontend tests pass. Market search, card-value, and flip-calc endpoints return real eBay Browse API data. Dashboard displays real eBay seller data (73 active listings, 9 sold) via Trading API.

issues: When raw price is higher than PSA 10 value (e.g., $2.5k raw vs $15 PSA10), shows large negative profit and ROI. This is expected behavior but could confuse users - consider adding a warning message or hiding flip calc when raw > graded.

passed_tests: GET /api/market/search?query=kobe+bryant - returns items array with prices, stats with median/avg/min/max - PASS
GET /api/market/card-value?query=luka+doncic+prizm - returns raw stats, psa10 stats, graded stats - PASS
GET /api/market/flip-calc?query=michael+jordan+fleer&grading_cost=30 - returns raw_price, psa10_value, potential_profit, roi_percent - PASS
GET /api/ebay/seller/my-listings - returns active listings (73) and sold items (9) from real eBay account - PASS
Market search with empty results - returns valid structure - PASS
Flip calc with custom grading cost - accepts parameter correctly - PASS
Frontend: Market page has search input and search button - PASS
Frontend: Market search shows Raw/Ungraded section with stats (median, avg, range) and listings - PASS
Frontend: Market search shows PSA 10/Gem Mint section with stats and listings - PASS
Frontend: Flip Calculator card appears showing raw price, psa10 value, grading cost, potential profit, ROI - PASS
Frontend: Dashboard shows real eBay data (73 active listings, 9 sold) with images, prices, time left - PASS
Frontend: Dashboard KPI cards show Active Listings, Sold, Inventory, Invested - PASS
Frontend: Account page shows 'eBay Connected' status in green with timestamp - PASS
Frontend: FlipFinder has all 4 tabs (Analizar, Monitor, Historial, AI) - PASS
Frontend: Sidebar navigation between all 6 modules works correctly - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Market endpoints correctly use eBay Browse API (app token) for public market data
eBay seller endpoints correctly use Trading API (user token) for real seller listings
Flip calculator correctly calculates: profit = psa10_value - raw_price - grading_cost
Dashboard pulls real-time eBay data with proper XML parsing for Trading API
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No test data created - all tests use real eBay API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module 3 (Market Data) and Module 4 (Flip Calculator) fully tested with real eBay API integration. eBay OAuth connected to pazacap0 account with 73 active listings and 9 sold items. Market endpoints use Browse API (app token), seller endpoints use Trading API (user token). Previous iterations tested Inventory category feature - 3 inventory items exist (1 with category='collection', 2 with category=null).

backend_endpoints.GET /api/market/card-value: PASS - Returns raw vs PSA10 vs graded market values
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ebay/seller/my-listings: PASS - Returns real seller listings via Trading API

frontend_features.flip_calculator: PASS - Shows profit calculation when data available
